history.title: Historical
history.intro: The press release below indicates the takeover by Guy Le Péchon of G & S, a consulting firm created in 2003 by members of the ADAE association.

press.title: Press release of May 4, 2009
press.subtitle: Governance and Structures offers integrated services to Boards of Directors
press.p1: Governance & Structures, a research and consulting company created in 2003, has just been taken over by one of its founding partners, Consultancy International Services.
press.p2: Now led by its partner/manager, Guy Le Péchon, X-INSEAD, member of the IFA, the «Gouvernance-Advisors» network of G & S can carry out very diverse missions: diagnostics and benchmarking on the functioning or composition of Boards of Directors with a view to increasing their added value, recruitment of corporate officers including directors, in particular independent ones, ad hoc use of new technologies, surveys and studies on corporate governance.
press.p3: Thus, G&S recently carried out an in-depth study on the place of female corporate officers within 550 French companies listed on Euronext and previously an original survey at the time on the theme of “governance, performance and modernity”, a survey in collaboration with ADAE and the company Acadys with a sample including medium-sized companies and subsidiaries of foreign groups.

pioneer.title: G & S pioneer for observing the feminization of Boards of Directors
pioneer.p1: G&S was the first to present detailed statistics on the feminization of boards of companies listed on Euronext Paris, during a meeting of INSEAD alumni in July 2009 during the preparation time for the Copé Zimmerman law.
pioneer.p2: The G&S study on “The place of women directors in French listed companies” presented below was updated based on the annual reports at the end of 2009.
pioneer.event: The Breakfast organized at the beginning of July 2009 by the Mixité Club and the INSEAD ALUMNI ASSOCIATION FRANCE Directors' Circle on the theme: “The place of women directors in French listed companies” brought together more than sixty participants.
pioneer.cta_program: To download the program for this event click here
pioneer.cta_slides: To browse the first slides of the presentation click here.
pioneer.cta_extracts: To obtain extracts from the study, send an email to info@g-et-s.com, clearly specifying your surnames, first names, contact details and functions.

missions.intro: The references below to the search for corporate officers carried out by G & S clearly illustrate the variety of needs and the ability to adapt that Governance & Structures can demonstrate for each particular case.

case1.title: Large French furniture products distribution company
case1.subtitle: Examination of the interest of appointing an administrator competent in logistics.
case1.text: The study showed that the right solution was to have an experienced logistics consultant lead an in-depth 18-month mission to improve the situation. G&S enabled his recruitment; the Managing Director considered the final result after two years to be remarkable.

case2.title: Preliminary study for the creation of a Board of Directors or Strategic Council
case2.text: This study with the managers of a brilliant start-up (SAS) in the field of IT services made it possible to enlighten these managers on the advantages and disadvantages of the different formulas and the approaches to follow depending on the decisions. Taking into account the context and the reflections resulting from the study, the decision was postponed.

case3.title: Search and co-optation of one of the directors of the company INFOGRAMMES
case3.text: This search for a person with financial skills was carried out in delicate conditions since the entire governance of the company was overhauled in order to better confront the difficulties encountered by the company.

case4.title: Placement of an administrator in an important family company: construction materials
case4.text: 6 children and their parents share responsibility for the Management Board and the Supervisory Board. They choose to bring an external personality onto the Board to professionalize the advice, benefit from the vision of the company by an external person and have a better risk analysis.

case5.title: In the field of real estate development: search for a General Secretary
case5.text: This successful search shows that the skills of G & S are not limited to the sole case of directors.

case6.title: In the second work of the building, mission for the recruitment of a General Director, corporate officer, intended to be the buyer of the company in the next 3 years.
case6.text: Original approach proposed by G & S in terms of sale/takeover of companies.

case7.title: Establishment of an administrator at Proméo
case7.cta: To see the administrator's testimony, click here

case8.title: Establishment of a director of a company intended to soon be listed on Alternext
case8.text: The independent director thus co-opted is a financial expert. His co-optation broadens the hitherto somewhat overly family-oriented composition of the Board of Directors. He will support this great company in full development in its presentations to financial analysts (“road shows”).

diag.title: Evaluation / Diagnosis of a Board of Directors or Supervisory Board
diag.breadcrumb: Home >> Missions >> Evaluation / Diagnosis of a Board of Directors or Supervisory Board
diag.q1: The composition of my Board of Directors is it in harmony with my company's strategy?
diag.q2: How does the functioning of my Board of Directors compare to good practices?
diag.q3: How can I validate today's situation vis-à-vis third parties? How to improve it?
diag.intro1: So many delicate questions to which you would like answers. But you do not have time to delve deeper, you feel that reluctance will arise among existing directors if you approach the subject without preparation.
diag.intro2: Certain third parties (e.g. potential investors) make you feel that they would like to be informed about this operation before engaging further with you.
diag.proposal: G & S offers you a systematic and rational method for establishing the diagnosis and recommendations for improvement.
diag.scope: G & S mainly works for all types of companies: listed, close to going public, subsidiaries of foreign companies, financing organizations with directors in other companies, etc. G & S adapts the composition of the team involved according to each particular case and offers a quote with commitments to results.

steps.title: The 5 steps recommended by G & S

s1.title: 1 — Understand the general context
s1.text: These are interviews with you and the other people you designate in order to fully understand the general context of your company and its Board of Directors.

s2.title: 2 — In the lists of good practices, select those which in your context are to be placed as a priority

s3.title: 3 — G & S then works for you
s3.text: by studying the file and interviewing the members to situate the functioning of the board in relation to good practices and the situation of other companies (see G&S survey).

s4.title: 4 — G & S presents its conclusions and recommendations and provides you with a report after validation with you
s4.text: Certain elements of such a report can be used to establish, for third parties upon request, the situation observed.

s5.title: 5 — G & S supports you in implementing changes
s5.text: in particular to help you push all stakeholders to improve the situation.

search_dir.title: Search for corporate officers
search_dir.breadcrumb: Home >> Missions >> Search for corporate officers
search_dir.section_title: Concerns related to the co-optation of an administrator
search_dir.intro: If you are considering co-opting a new director, corporate officer and/or manager, probably an external event has prompted you to reflect on the governance of your company.
search_dir.context: Often the resignation or retirement of one of your corporate officers, a change in the distribution of capital, the arrival on one of your markets of a powerful competitor, the desire to grow your business abroad... gave you the idea of co-opting a new administrator or one of your managers to improve the governance of your company.
search_dir.value1: G & S, often associated with this type of reflection, can usefully advise you in this preliminary phase on possible directions in this type of situation.
search_dir.value2: In the case of an SARL, it generally involves looking not for an administrator but for a member of the ad hoc committee that you may use to support your strategic thinking.
search_dir.traditional: The traditional approach for this type of recruitment most often consists of talking to other administrators, friends and relations, to detect the person to co-opt or recruit.
search_dir.traditional_limits: This approach ensures confidentiality and requires few resources, but in no way guarantees that the candidate selected is one of the best possible to improve the governance of your company and may prove unsuccessful in the medium term.
search_dir.proposal: G & S offers you a method to broaden the field of search for potential director candidates.
search_dir.scope: G & S mainly works for companies such as medium-sized companies, listed or not, companies close to going public, subsidiaries of foreign companies, financing organizations with directors in other companies. Indeed, such companies are more disadvantaged than large companies such as those listed on the CAC 40 stock exchange.

steps.title: The 5 steps recommended by G & S

s1.title: 1 — Understand the context
s1.text: These involve interviews with you and other people you designate in order to fully understand the general context of your company and its Board of Directors.

s2.title: 2 — Define with you the characteristics of the profile of the director to find

s3.title: 3 — G & S then works for you to select several potential candidates
s3.text: The strength of G & S is its network of relationships.

s4.title: 4 — You select the candidate of your choice
s4.text: through well-prepared, few and effective interviews. G & S provides you with its support to define the modalities to be finalized.

s5.title: 5 — G & S ensures the successful completion of the mission in the medium term

ex1.title: Study of the place of women as corporate officers in 400 French companies listed on Euronext
ex1.full_pres_link: A complete presentation with oral commentary
ex1.text: Based on the companies' annual reports at the end of 2016, a detailed systematic analysis of the names of women present on the boards of directors, supervisory boards and management boards allowed G & S, according to a large number of parameters such as compartments A, B or C of Euronext and the type of activity, to situate the place of women in these companies in relation to the average (men + women).
ex1.database: Thanks to this study, G & S has a database of nearly 1,000 female directors with their main characteristics (age, nationality, independence, etc.).
ex1.cta: If interested on the subject, send an email to G & S: info@g-et-s.com

ex2.title: In-depth investigation into the functioning of boards of directors on a sample of medium to small companies
ex2.text: With ADAE and the company ACADYS, G & S, using a detailed questionnaire, conducted a survey among CEOs, Directors and secretaries of Boards of Directors.

training.law_2014: The French Law of August 2014 extends the Law of January 2011 for unlisted public limited companies from 500 to 250 employees (and 50 million euros in turnover or balance sheet total) with the obligation in 2020 to have 40% women on Boards of more than 8 members and a difference between the number of men and women equal to or less than two for boards of 8 members or fewer.

eu.title: The European Commission has published a press release concerning the presence of women on company boards.
eu.text: The Commission's proposed Directive sets a target of 40% women in relation to the total number of non-executive directors in 2020 for listed companies (companies with less than 250 people and turnover of less than 50 million euros are excluded) and in 2018 for public companies.

ifa.title: IFA work on digital
ifa.intro: Under the leadership of the President of the IFA, Daniel Lebègue, I was able to actively participate in the 2 successive working groups which made it possible to present 2 reports whose content was advanced for the time:

report1.title: What information does the Administrator need
report1.text1: The main thing was to properly list, describe and classify the information useful to an administrator by indicating who the authors were with the level of confidentiality during their creation/validation (example: the Annual Report).
report1.text2: This report was the subject of a specific study by G & S with a pilot of an online computer application offering a catalog of around a hundred documents identified for the administrator.

report2.title: The Board of Directors and the digital transformation of companies
report2.text: The starting point of the working group was to be concerned about the risks involved, but it appeared important throughout the work to highlight the positive issues for the company of this digital transformation.

page_mentions_legales.danscette_page_gouvernance_structures_pr: In this page, Governance & Structures specifies the legal elements relating to its WEB site
page_mentions_legales.conformement_a_la_loi_du_6_janvier_1978_: In accordance with the law of January 6 1978 relating to computing, files and freedoms and article 43 of the law of September 30, 1986 as amended, the site has been declared to the National Commission for Information Technology and Freedoms (CNIL).
page_mentions_legales.les_utilisateurs_du_site_g_et_s_com_sont:
Users of the G-et-S.com site are required to comply with the provisions of the Data Protection Act, files and freedoms, violation of which is punishable by criminal sanctions.
They must in particular refrain, with regard to personal information to which they could access, from any collection, any misuse, and in general, from any act likely to infringe the private life or reputation of the persons.
In accordance with article 34 of the “Informatique et Libertés” Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978, the Internet user has the right to access, modify, rectify and delete data concerning him or her. G & S strives to comply with the GDPR Law of May 2018. It can do so by sending a letter to our G & S head office specifying the nature of its request.

page_mentions_legales.les_informations_fournies_par_linternaut: The information provided by the Internet user, when recorded by G & S, is considered by G & S as not having to be disseminated to a third party without the Internet user's consent, but G & S, despite the precautions taken (SSL encryption) cannot absolutely guarantee confidentiality during the process of transmitting messages via the Internet. In the event that the Internet user wishes to transmit information of a strictly confidential nature, he must contact G & S directly (see contacts).

page_apports_ia_compliance.avant_propos_reflexions_dun_beotien_de_l: FOREWORD: REFLECTIONS OF A BOOTIAN ON AI AND COMPLIANCE
page_apports_ia_compliance.nayant_pas_de_competences_particulieres_: Having no particular skills on AI, I contented myself with writing the following foreword.
page_apports_ia_compliance.maintenant_depuis_plus_dune_annee_le_sys: Now For more than a year, the “ChatGPT4” AI system has been made available to the general public. The major designers/suppliers of these new so-called “generative” AI services, in an atmosphere of strong emulation among themselves, have deployed their marketing strike force. The snowball effect played a role, creating a surge phenomenon. Many people and organizations, not necessarily qualified, saw an opportunity to make themselves known by speaking in the media and publishing articles or books... For the curious philistine that I am, it's a bit like quenching your thirst at a fire hydrant. A few occasional searches to find an answer to my questions were far from enlightening me.
page_apports_ia_compliance.or_la_variete_des_systemes_dia_la_rapidi: However, the variety of AI systems, the speed of arrival of new tools, the intrinsic difficulty of really understanding "how it works", what good it can be used for and the risks of misdirection due to bias are very real obstacles.
page_apports_ia_compliance.une_interessante_approche_possible_consi: An interesting possible approach consists of using examples use of AI in a specialty, such as Compliance, an activity normally known to managers.
page_apports_ia_compliance.aussi_lorsque_en_tant_que_membre_du_comi: Also when, as a member of the Scientific Committee of the Ad Valorem collection of Harmattan, I was asked to reread this work, I did so in full with interest. I learned a lot there, including about compliance! Compliance is observed essentially from a financial, banking, tax point of view, and also from the prism of governance and HR.
page_apports_ia_compliance.bien_des_chapitres_de_cet_ouvrage_sadres: Many chapters of this book are also aimed at political and economic decision-makers, compliance, law and figures professionals, Artificial Intelligence engineers and students and all people interested in compliance.
page_apports_ia_compliance.dautres_beotiens_devraient_apprecier_a_l: Other philistines should enjoy reading this book, accessible and embellished with concrete examples, and come back to it when a new question arises.
page_apports_ia_compliance.apports_de_lintelligence_artificielle_a_: Contributions of Artificial Intelligence to Compliance
Contributions of Artificial Intelligence to Compliance
page_apports_ia_compliance.en_tant_que_membre_du_comite_scientifiqu: As a member of the Scientific Committee of the Ad Valorem collection of the publisher L’Harmattan, I was asked to give an opinion on the book being written « The contributions of artificial intelligence and Compliance ».

page_bibliographie.un_extrait_du_rapport_bouton_concernantl:
An extract from the Bouton report concerning
the criteria allowing to qualify
an “independent” director
are recalled here:
page_bibliographie.1_ni_mandataire_social_ni_salarie_actuel:
1- Neither corporate officer nor current employee (or within the last five years).
2- Neither “crossed” administrator.
3- Neither significant customer, supplier or banker (business or financing) or representing a significant part of the company's activity.
4- Neither close family ties with a corporate officer.
5- Neither partner nor current collaborator of the Statutory Auditors (or during the last five years).
6- Neither a director of the company (for more than twelve years).
7- Shareholders:
– Less than 10%: independent if does not participate in the control.
– Greater than 10%: review by the board, depending on the composition of capital and the existence of potential conflicts of interest.
page_bibliographie.on_directorshipshareholder_advocates_are:
On Directorship
Shareholder advocates are keen to point out the risk of company directors becoming captured by "groupthink".
Peter Tunjic, Lawyer/Writer/Creator, Melbourne, Australia
Original article explaining the reasons, presence and dangers of "groupthink" within boards
Harvard Business Review France (11/12/2014)
Women's representation, a source of renewal for boards of directors.
Viviane de Beaufort (Professeur à l'ESSEC) (Formation Women Be European Board Ready)
Detailed argument on the benefits of having women directors on Boards
LIBERATION (29/05/2014)
"Presenteeism: male alibi to avoid household chores?
François Fatoux, Membre du laboratoire de l'égalité
Remarkable and in-depth analysis of the five forms of presenteeism at work, including the fifth form "totally taboo, which affects the vast majority of men who are satisfied without wanting to acknowledge it with having to remain "stuck" at work because coming home early means preparing the meal, ensuring the children's school attendance, giving them food, doing the cleaning. It is still nicer to go home when everything is done."
G & S sees this as one of the causes of the glass ceiling. In fact, these cumulative late working hours, for example over a year, can result in good results in professional activities. However, these good results, and not the presence itself, will have a positive influence on the appreciation given and consequently on the advancement of those who practice them.
LA TRIBUNE (5/9/12)
"Quotas for women directors across the EU soon"
Marina Torre

Le 7 décembre 2011
Madame La Députée Marie-José Zimmermann a organisé une matinale dans le salon Lamartine de l'Assemblée Nationale avec pour thème:
« Présidents et Présidentes, où en sommes nous de l'application de la Loi du 27 janvier 2011 sur la représentation équilibrée des femmes et des hommes dans les Advice from listed companies? »
Guy Le Péchon a présenté l'étude G & S sur la situation au 30 juin 2011 quant aux directors on the Boards of Directors and Supervisory Boards of 500 French companies listed on Euronext Paris.
La page de synthèse résumant les éléments essentiels présentés peut être déchargée en cliquant ici.
Monsieur Jean-François Coppé, Madame Anne-Marie Rocco de la revue Challenges et Madame Maryam SALEHI, Directrice Déléguée à la DiGeneral Manager and Director of the company NRJ, then spoke in turn. An exchange with the audience followed. One of the conclusions of this morning session was that the Law was already prompting reflection on the composition of Boards of Directors and Supervisory Boards, and ultimately would lead to better “Corporate Governance” of companies.
Pour tout renseignement envoyer un courriel à info@g-et-s.com
Le 10 octobre 2011
A l'Essec (Viviane De Beaufort) Réunion de lancement de la seconde session de formation "Women Be European Board ready".
Le thème de cette réunion a été le recrutement des administrateurs en France et en Angleterre. Guy Le Péchon, au titre de l'Institute of Directors, a résumé la situation en Angleterre. Pour recevoir les transparents de sa présentation, il vous suffit d'envoyer un courriel avec vos coordonnées à info@g-et-s.com

une conférence était organisée par l'association Business Family Network sur le thème de la Loi du 27 Janvier 2011,
Madame Caroline Ressot, Secrétaire Générale de l'Observatoire de la Parité et Guy Le Péchon G & S ont pu présenter la situation passée, la Loi et les évolutions qui se dessinent.

une conférence était organisée par NYSE Euronext sur «Quel(le) administrateur pour demain ?»
Le dialogue qui a été initié avec Mme Maryse Aulagnon, Président directeur général, Groupe Affine, et administrateur de Air France-KLM, M. Alain Martel, Secrétaire général, IFA, Mme Viviane Neiter, Administrateur de Dolphin Intégration, de Prodware et censeure de Ginger Grontmij France, et M. Guy Le Péchon, Associé gérant, G&S, a permis de présenter aux sociétés cotées les moyens disponibles pour répondre aux exigences de la loi sur la parité dans les conseils.

L'actualité n'annihile pas les écrits passés importants

Un extrait du rapport Bouton concernant
les critères permettant de qualifier
un administrateur "d'indépendant"
sont rappelés ici:

1- Ni mandataire social, ni salarié actuel (ou over the past five years).
2- Ni administrateur "croisé".
3- Ni client, fournisseur ou banquier (d'affaires ou de financement) significatif ou représentant une part significative de l'activité de la société.
4- Ni lien familial proche avec un mandataire social.
5- Ni associé, ni collaborateur actuel de Commissaires aux comptes (ou over the past five years).
6- Ni administrateur de l'entreprise (depuis plus de douze ans).
7- Actionnaires:
– Inférieur à 10% : indépendant si ne participe pas au contrôle.
– Supérieur à 10% : examen par le advice, depending on the composition of the capital and the existence of potential conflicts of interest.

Madame Deputy Marie-José Zimmermann organized a morning in the Lamartine lounge of the National Assembly with the theme:
“Presidents, where are we in the application of the Law of January 27, 2011 on the balanced representation of women and men on the Boards of listed companies? »
Guy Le Péchon presented the G&S study on the situation as of June 30, 2011 regarding female directors on the Boards of Directors and Supervisory Boards of 500 French companies listed on Euronext Paris.
The summary page summarizing the essential elements presented can be downloaded by clicking here.
Mr. Jean-François Coppé, Mrs. Anne-Marie Rocco of Challenges magazine and Mrs. Maryam SALEHI, Deputy Director of General Management and Director of the NRJ company, then successively spoke. An exchange with the audience followed. One of the conclusions of this morning was that the Law led today to reflect on the composition of Boards of Directors and Supervisory Boards, and ultimately would lead to better "Corporate Governance" of companies.
For any information send an email to info@g-et-s.com
page_bibliographie.le_10_octobre_2011a_lessec_viviane_de_be:
October 10, 2011
At Essec (Viviane De Beaufort) Launch meeting of the second training session "Women Be European Board ready".
The theme of this meeting was the recruitment of administrators in France and England. Guy Le Péchon, on behalf of the Institute of Directors, summarized the situation in England. To receive the slides of his presentation, simply send an email with your contact details to info@g-et-s.com
page_bibliographie.le_9_juin_2011une_conference_etait_organ:
June 9, 2011
a conference was organized by the association Business Family Network on the theme of the Law of January 27, 2011,
Madame Caroline Ressot, Secretary General of the Parity Observatory and Guy Le Péchon G & S were able to present the past situation, the Law and the developments which are emerging.
page_bibliographie.le_29_avril_2011une_conference_etait_org:
April 29, 2011
a conference was organized by NYSE Euronext on “Which director for tomorrow?”
The dialogue which was initiated with Ms. Maryse Aulagnon, Chairman and CEO, Affine Group, and director of Air France-KLM, Mr. Alain Martel, Secretary General, IFA, Ms. Viviane Neiter, Director of Dolphin Integration, of Prodware and censor of Ginger Grontmij France, and Mr. Guy Le Péchon, Managing Partner, G&S, made it possible to present to listed companies the means available to meet the requirements of the law on parity on boards.

page_bibliographie.lactualite_nannihile_pas_les_ecrits_pass:
News does not annihilate important past writings

An extract from the Bouton report concerning
the criteria making it possible to qualify
an administrator as "independent"
are recalled here:

1- Neither corporate officer nor current employee (or within the last five years).
2- Neither “crossed” administrator.
3- Neither significant customer, supplier or banker (business or financing) or representing a significant part of the company's activity.
4- Neither close family ties with a corporate officer.
5- Neither partner nor current collaborator of the Statutory Auditors (or during the last five years).
6- Neither a director of the company (for more than twelve years).
7- Shareholders:
– Less than 10%: independent if does not participate in the control.
– Greater than 10%: review by the board, depending on the composition of capital and the existence of potential conflicts of interest.

page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.a_titre_dexemple_voici_deux_premieres_qu: As an example, here are the first two questions taken from the questionnaire:
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.lapplication_de_la_loi_rixain_ayant_comm: The application of the Rixain law having begun, G & S thought that for all players in the field, it would be very interesting to have the results of a survey of the companies concerned by this Law to find out how they gradually organized themselves in such a way as to respect it.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.g_s_a_partir_des_donnees_du_fichier_sire: G & S based on data from the INSEE SIRENE file estimates that around a thousand companies are within the strict scope of the Law.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.g_s_a_elabore_un_questionnaire_et_la_mis: G & S developed a questionnaire and put it online. Then, via a mailing, the companies completing it anonymously were asked to then retrieve the results of the survey to position themselves in relation to their peers and have ideas for improving their own process to achieve the objectives of the Law.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.malheureusement_tres_peu_dentreprise_ont: Unfortunately very few companies responded to this questionnaire.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.mais_aujourdhui_les_societes_concernees_: But today the companies concerned by the law, or simply wishing to progress regarding the feminization of their governing bodies (COMEX CODIR) may be interested in using this questionnaire as a self-diagnosis.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.il_sagit_de_vos_instances_dirigeantes_ho: This concerns your Governing Bodies outside the Board of Directors or Supervisory Board.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.votre_societe_peut_avoir_plusieurs_insta:
Your company may have several governing bodies, for the sake of simplification and homogeneity for the survey, we thank you for answering the questions on the Governing Body considered to be major.
The members of the other Bodies are part of the group studied further, in the "Leading Executives" section.
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.quel_est_le_nom_de_linstance_dirigeante_: What is the NAME of the major Governing Body of your company? *
page_questionnaire_rixain_societes.envisagez_vous_une_evolution_du_nombre_d:
Do you envisage an evolution in the number of members of this Governing Body? *
Only one possible answer.

page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.en_tant_que_membre_du_comite_scientifiqu: As a member of the Scientific Committee of the Ad Valorem collection of the publisher L'Harmattan, I was asked to write the preface to the book currently being written "The Liberated Enterprise".
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.lorsque_a_la_demande_de_valerie_lejeune_: When, at the request of Valérie Lejeune, Director of the Ad Valorem collection, I started reading the book, I was a little disconcerted to read a sort of autobiography of the author describing in the first person in a very direct manner his years of very varied professional experience with numerous successes, mainly in the field of industrial production. Surprised, but as for a novel, captured by the pleasant story, the desire to know the rest of the stages in the professional life of a somewhat rebellious engineer was created. I continued reading.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.je_fus_aussi_amuse_de_retrouver_des_anec: I was also amused to find anecdotes similar to mine, for example, seeing the author convince, by practicing it, of the interest of the “PERT” method of planning multiple tasks nested within a project. The author had to show a lot of tenacity to obtain calculation times! The PERT method, innovative at the time, was made feasible thanks to the relative power of existing computers. Data had to be entered using punched cards and at least one hour of computing time was needed to process a network of 500 tasks. Today on a microcomputer, once the data is entered on the screen, a few seconds are enough to process and see the colored results on the screen.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.lattention_du_lecteur_ayant_ete_ainsi_ac: The reader's attention having thus been acquired, the latter, in particular if he manages a company and wishes to broaden his culture in corporate governance, will find in the rest of the book an in-depth analysis of business models resulting from or related to the "Liberated Enterprise" approach with an exemplary implementation by the company FAVI. Models with a large reliance on staff members organized into autonomous units.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.lhypothese_sous_jacente_est_que_les_moti: The underlying assumption is that people's motivations are considered to be located at a high level in the classic Maslow diagram, a diagram that the author comments on in depth. The author situates his personal experience in relation to these models. By simplifying, like Mr. Jourdain, he practiced certain recommendations that were often simple common sense, without really knowing it.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.utilisant_cette_experience_personnelle_y: Using this personal experience, including as a teacher and lecturer, as well as his intimate knowledge of these models, the author then describes the model he advocates. He called it "Janus", perhaps in reference to the Roman god Janus, a two-headed god capable of opening doors to both the past and the future. In a detailed and very open manner, he describes his model in detail with tables on how to apply it. Very useful part, for those, probably consultants rather than managers themselves, who want to implement his model to transform a company.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.le_livre_contient_divers_schemas_illustr: The book contains various diagrams illustrating the author's vision which I happily make my own, namely "a complex idea only really exists if it can be presented using a diagram". Very deep underlying question: “Can we do without words to think and communicate? ". Personally, I believe so.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.alors_que_souvent_les_dirigeants_critiqu: While managers often criticize standards such as ISO 9001, 14 001,... as cumbersome and only restrictive, he explains with concrete examples how to use them as levers for the transformation of companies.
page_salarie_dirigeants_confiance.lauteur_regrette_de_voir_que_ces_modeles: The author regrets to see that these models are rarely applied in France. In conjunction with the numerous contacts he has been able to establish, could he devote time to establishing a diagnosis explaining the reasons for this lack of interest among managers in putting these models into practice, including his own! and suggest recommendations. This could be the theme of his next book.

page_shadow_conseil.une_approche_innovante_le_conseil_dadmin: An innovative approach: The Board of Directors of young people
page_shadow_conseil.quelle_societe_sera_la_premiere_a_la_ten: Which company will be the first to try it?
page_shadow_conseil.plus_de_jeunes_dans_les_conseils_dadmini: MORE YOUNG PEOPLE ON BOARDS OF DIRECTORS ?
page_shadow_conseil.en_ces_temps_dassemblees_generales_et_de: In these times of General Assemblies, and appointments of new members of Boards of Directors or Supervisory Boards, the rejuvenation of members of Boards of Directors is legitimately examined.
page_shadow_conseil.par_manque_de_connaissance_de_la_realite: Due to lack of knowledge of reality, for the general public a Board of Directors is often still imagined as a group of people of a certain age.
page_shadow_conseil.ce_nest_pas_tout_a_fait_vrai_mais_il_nem: This is not entirely true, but the fact remains that even through simple common sense, the contribution of new ideas from younger generations would surely be an asset.
page_shadow_conseil.la_diversite_dages_des_membres_dun_conse: The age diversity of the members of a Board is certainly indisputably desirable, but will one or two younger directors be enough? Will they really be and can they be recruited?
page_shadow_conseil.sans_doute_pas_vraiment_en_effet_sauf_ca: Probably not really, except in very exceptional cases, essentially in the field of new technologies, given the experience required to be a qualified administrator, these young members of a Board will be at least 35 years old and will therefore no longer be real young people. Then, in the age group under 60, qualified candidates often have an intense traditional professional activity, for example as a fully employed Director of their company. Being a member of a council at the same time should develop, but nevertheless poses concrete problems of availability, agreement of the employer, possible conflict of interest, etc…
page_shadow_conseil.en_resume_dans_les_recrutements_le_crite: In summary, in recruitment the “age” criterion must be taken into account, but this will not be the real solution to ensure this potential contribution and positive confrontation of ideas of young people with the members of the Council.
page_shadow_conseil.lapproche_suggeree_par_ce_billet_par_gou: The approach suggested by this post by Governance & Structures is, under the leadership of the Board of Directors, to create a Youth Council. With slightly different objectives, some Municipalities use this approach. This Youth Council would be made up of around ten volunteers aged 18 to 25 who would cover any costs. They would be recruited through “internet” advertisements for 3 years (with renewal of a third of them each year) aiming for gender parity and a wide diversity of backgrounds. They would be led by the Secretary of the Board of Directors assisted by an HR manager.
page_shadow_conseil.le_conseil_en_leur_fournissant_la_docume: The Board, by providing them with the necessary documentation, would ask them, say three times a year, to reflect on a theme examined at a future Board meeting and to make proposals. We can think of issues on which young people can be made aware; new technologies including social networks and data protection, ecology, ethics, international, etc. Once a year, on one of these themes, a half-day of direct exchange would be organized with the physical presence of the members of the Board of Directors during one of its meetings.
page_shadow_conseil.la_formule_serait_legere_et_nentrainerai: The formula would be light and would not entail significant expenses, it would allow the members of the Board of Directors in a flexible and friendly framework to be positively and concretely confronted with the ideas of young people and why not to retain some of them for implementation.
page_shadow_conseil.les_jeunes_en_tireraient_surement_un_pro: The young people would surely benefit personally and indirectly their loved ones. Indeed, they would thus benefit from an opening on the “Corporate Governance” of companies and their senior managers.
page_shadow_conseil.lentreprise_pourrait_incidemment_dans_ce: The company could incidentally in this context identify young talents to hire later.
page_shadow_conseil.la_societe_pourrait_utiliser_de_cette_ap: The company could use this approach to improve its brand image, in particular among young people.
page_shadow_conseil.bien_des_discours_et_ecrits_pronent_linn: Many speeches and writings advocate innovation, and as we are beginning to know, innovation is not only technological, it can also be organizational and social. Here is a concrete example of this type of innovation.

Governance & Structures
